tests.name: routing/results/project adds the plugin id to relations that do not already have provenance
routing/results/project preserves missing relations when adding plugin provenance
routing/results/project projects file analysis relations into graph connections
routing/results/project returns no projected connections when the analysis has no relations
routing/results/merge builds an empty analysis result for a file path
routing/results/merge prefers later items when merging lists by id
routing/results/merge keeps base items when no later items are provided
routing/results/merge treats missing item arrays as empty lists
routing/results/merge deduplicates relations by the routed relation key
routing/results/merge keeps base relations when no later relations are provided
routing/results/merge treats missing relation arrays as empty lists
routing/results/merge merges analysis results field by field
routing/results/merge keeps the base file path when the next result omits it
routing/results/keys serializes every base relation field in order and uses empty placeholders for missing optionals
routing/results/keys includes resolved target fields for call-like relations
routing/results/keys includes every resolved target field for call and reference relations
routing/results/keys omits resolved target fields for non-call relations
routing/results/keys uses pipe separators between every serialized relation segment
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/results builds 1-based ranges from parser coordinates
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/results builds symbol ids with and without a signature suffix
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/results creates symbols with ids, ranges, and optional signatures
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/results normalizes relations with the Tree-sitter plugin id without mutating inputs
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/results adds import relations with defaults and explicit overrides
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/results adds call, inherit, and reference relations with the expected fields
routing/results builds distinct relation keys for resolved call targets
